title: Accelerating Transformers Fine-Tuning with NVIDIA NeMo AutoModel
summary: 本文介绍了NVIDIA NeMo AutoModel如何加速Transformer模型的微调过程，通过自动化配置和优化技术提升训练效率。
highlights: NVIDIA NeMo AutoModel simplifies and accelerates fine-tuning of Transformer models.
Automated configuration and optimization reduce manual effort and training time.
Supports a wide range of NLP and vision Transformer architectures.
